allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem *ekt in GIT sein. Das habe ich gerade angelegt:)
PowerShell(npx sanity projects create "Samaritano" --organization personal 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell(npx sanity projects list 2>&1 | Out-String; Write-Host "---ORGS---"; node -e "const {createClient} = require\('@sanity/client'\); const c = createClient\({apiVersion:'2024-01-01', token: process.env.SANITY_AUTH_TOKEN || ''}\); c.request\({uri:'/organizations'}\).then\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r,null,2\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; $r.value | Select-Object id, name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; Write-Host "Type: $\($r.GetType\(\).Name\)"; Write-Host "Count: $\($r.Count\)"; if \($r.value\) { $r.value | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\)" } } else { $r | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "$\($_.id\) - $\($_.name\)" } })

PowerShell($token = "sk2L8n6VNV7S47ikIqsISfs4VN8PTZI1GTbf7r1S9izY5uDldMrTfvFXrzcmTdvXdUKS2aocso5bTu0BP"; $h = @{Authorization = "Bearer $token"}; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.sanity.io/v2024-01-01/organizations" -Headers $h; $obj = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Top-level type: $\($obj.GetType\(\).Name\)"; if \($obj -is [array]\) { $obj | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "id=$\($_.id\) name=$\($_.name\)" } } else { $obj.PSObject.Properties.Name | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "Key: $_" } })
